title: cuscuta europaea var. indica
intro: Cuscuta europaea var. indica, commonly known as Dodder, is a parasitic plant that grows by attaching itself to other plants and absorbing their nutrients. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta europaea var. indica are said to include improving fertility, reducing stress and anxiety, and enhancing cognitive function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of capsules, tablets, or powder, and is also used to make teas and infusions.
